title: Package Morph Transition (Shrink Time-Machine)
result_description: A product's current (smaller) package morphs and grows into its older, larger version on the same spot, then a weight/price overlay reveals the shrink while particle 'missing weight' dust falls off the smaller pack. Ends on a remove-background operator end card.

inputs.name: current_pack
inputs.what_to_film: Locked-off on a tripod: the CURRENT (smaller/newer) package centered on a plain surface, plain background, even light. Hold static 3-4s. This is the shot the morph starts on.

capture_requirements.framing: package centered, same distance + same spot as old_pack
capture_requirements.lighting: even, no window behind; identical to old_pack

inputs.name: old_pack
inputs.what_to_film: NOT filmed by you. A sourced, REAL front-facing photo of the OLDER (larger/original) package, used as a held still the current pack morphs into. Must be a real photo/screenshot of the real old box (three-bucket rule) - never AI-generated or hand-built packaging. Crop to the box, plain/neutral background preferred.

capture_requirements.framing: old box front, centered to land on the same spot current_pack occupies

inputs.name: operator_endcard
inputs.what_to_film: Talking-head end card: you, deadpan, delivering the CTA. Plain background so Remove Background cuts you cleanly. 3-5s.

capture_requirements.framing: head-and-shoulders, centered, room to place text beside you

params.note: old_pack begins exactly where current_pack ends so the morph lands on one spot
old_pack grows ~18% during/after the flip to read as 'it used to be bigger'

edit_steps.target: current_pack (smaller pack, masked to its silhouette)

params.intent: the 'missing weight' falls off the smaller pack

timing.cue: on the current pack, before the flip
as the old pack grows in

params.note: match grade across current_pack + old_pack so only size/weight differs, not color/temperature
riser into the flip; whoosh ON the morph cut; royalty-free bed ~0.15-0.2 under VO

result.description: Smaller current pack flips/morphs and grows into the larger older pack on one spot; weight + same-price overlay reveals the shrink; dust falls off the smaller pack; deadpan operator end card with CTA.
success_criteria: Both packs land on the exact same spot (no jump)
Size difference reads instantly; color/light match so only size changed
Every on-screen number traces to the data anchor
End card operator is cleanly cut out (no halo)

source_meta.notes: Morph/grow time-machine transition for shrinkflation before/after. Numbers in edit_steps are the Kraft Mac & Cheese (Kraft Dinner) 225 g -> 200 g anchor placeholders; swap per episode.
